title: Gastrorchis simulans
taxonomy: Gastrorchis simulans is a species of orchid. Gastrorchis simulans is classified as a member of the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it is placed in the subtribe Angraecinae. The genus Gastrorchis is closely related to the genus Angorchis. Gastrorchis simulans is native to the island of Madagascar.
